name: Tween.js - JavaScript/TypeScript animation engine · GitHub
snippet: JavaScript (TypeScript) tweening engine for easy animations, incorporating optimised Robert Penner's equations. NPM Version CDNJS NPM Downloads Build and Tests.

name: TweenJS | A JavaScript library for tweening and animating HTML5
snippet: A simple but powerful JavaScript library for tweening and animating HTML5 and JavaScript properties. Works stand-alone or integrated with EaselJS.
